description_long: This is a modern, rectangular wooden cabinet with a light oak finish, featuring a clean and minimalist design. The front side displays two central doors or drawers, flanked by open shelving on both sides, and two small open cubby compartments above the drawers. The top surface is flat and spacious, suitable for placing decorative items or electronics. The sides and back are solid panels with a consistent wood grain texture, and the overall construction appears sturdy and functional. The cabinet is likely designed for use as a TV stand or media console, with ample storage for electronics, books, or other household items. No visible handles or glass panels are present, emphasizing its streamlined aesthetic.
description: A light oak-finished rectangular cabinet with central drawers, open side shelves, and a flat top, designed for modern storage or media use. Its minimalist, handle-free design and sturdy build make it suitable for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing two central drawers or doors, two open cubby compartments above, and open shelving on both sides.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a solid wood panel with no visible openings or features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, solid back panel with no openings or decorative elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, with a solid wood panel and no features.
